_meta.purpose: CivicPulse AI Knowledge Graph — READ THIS FIRST before the PDF
_meta.instruction: Any AI model working on this project MUST read this JSON graph before doing any work. This encodes the full 20-page CivicPulse_AI_v5_FINAL.pdf in structured form. Do NOT re-parse the PDF unless you need raw quote text.

project_summary.name: CivicPulse AI
project_summary.stack: Gemini + Google Cloud · Premium Frontend (GSAP/Lenis/LoadingScreen) · demo.html working app · 24h Build
project_summary.problem_statement: Broken civic complaint systems — reports lost, no tracking, zero accountability
project_summary.solution: 5-agent autonomous AI pipeline on Google Cloud transforming citizen reports into government action, presented via an award-winning UI/UX.

problems_solved.title: Fragmented Reporting
problems_solved.description: Citizens use WhatsApp, calls, or Twitter — no unified channel. Most issues never officially logged.

problems_solved.title: Zero Accountability
problems_solved.description: Once filed (if ever), no tracking. Citizens have no visibility into resolution status.

problems_solved.title: Duplicate Complaints
problems_solved.description: Same pothole may be reported 50+ times, wasting authority triage resources.

problems_solved.title: No Predictive Action
problems_solved.description: Authorities react only after failure. Data-driven preventive maintenance is non-existent.

problems_solved.title: Digital Divide
problems_solved.description: Existing e-governance apps require smartphones, English literacy, tech confidence — excluding 60% of citizens.

problems_solved.title: Corruption & Impunity
problems_solved.description: Officers delay resolutions, file fake closures, misuse budgets with zero data-driven detection.

solutions.title: One Unified Platform
solutions.description: Photo, voice (Gemini Live), or text — any device, any language. Single source of truth.

solutions.title: 5-Agent Lifecycle Pipeline
solutions.description: Reporter → Verification → Routing → Escalation → Prediction agents handle every report end-to-end, autonomously.

solutions.title: AI Deduplication Engine
solutions.description: Gemini vision similarity + GPS proximity clustering (50m radius) merges duplicates automatically.

solutions.title: Civic Digital Twin + Heatmaps
solutions.description: Live city map: Green/Amber/Red zones. BigQuery ML predicts failure before citizens notice.

solutions.title: Voice + Multilingual Agent
solutions.description: Gemini Live converts Kannada/Hindi/Tamil/Telugu to structured complaint in <1.5s.

solutions.title: Corruption Detection AI
solutions.description: Flags officers with SLA breach patterns, fake closures, visual diff anomalies. Per-officer Integrity Risk Score.

agents.name: Reporter Agent
capabilities: Accepts photo + voice/text in any Indic language via Gemini Live
Extracts: category, severity, exact location, urgency
Asks one clarifying question if image confidence <0.7
Stores full gemini_raw_response + agent_trace in DB
Outputs structured JSON complaint ticket in <2s

agents.name: Verification Agent
capabilities: Detects duplicates: image pHash similarity >= 0.7 within 50m GPS radius
Identifies coordinated false reporting via rate-limit pattern analysis
Requests nearby citizen upvotes (5 = auto-verified, auto-escalated)
Assigns community trust score. Appends to agent_trace log.

agents.name: Routing Agent
capabilities: PostGIS geo-query: GPS coords → ward → department → officer
Selects officer by lowest current_load + ward match
Drafts contextual assignment message using BBMP guidelines in system context
Logs routing rationale to agent_trace for Explain Decision panel

agents.name: Escalation Agent
capabilities: Monitors SLA timer. Sends reminders at 24h, 36h via FCM.
Auto-escalates to senior officer if no ACK within SLA window
Suggests temporary safety measures to citizens via SMS
Detects SLA breach patterns per officer → feeds Corruption Detection

agents.name: Prediction Agent
capabilities: BigQuery ML trains logistic regression on seeded 3-year Bengaluru data
Uses CREATE MODEL query (shown in demo) — no AutoML wait time
Outputs ward-level risk scores refreshed weekly via Cloud Scheduler
Feeds Civic Digital Twin heatmap layer in real time

features.name: Civic Digital Twin
features.description: BigQuery ML + Cloud Scheduler live city health map. Green/Amber/Red zones updated hourly. BQML logistic regression trained on seeded Bengaluru data.
features.wow_factor: Immediately separates CivicPulse from complaint apps
features.demo: Show Bengaluru map: Koramangala amber → Risk: 82%, waterlogging likely in ~10 days (BQML)

features.name: Civic AI Mayor
features.description: Gemini 2.0 Pro with BBMP multi-hundred-page urban governance guidelines pre-loaded in 2M-token context window.
features.example_query: Why are potholes increasing in Whitefield?
features.example_response: Rainfall +32%, Budget −18%, Traffic +22%. Recommend: ₹1.8 Cr, Zones 4–5. (Cites BBMP Sec 7.3.2)

features.name: Voice Agent — 12 Indic Languages
features.description: Gemini Live streaming STT. Citizen speaks in Kannada — system detects language, creates complaint, assigns priority, reads status back in Kannada. IVR fallback for 2G feature phones.

features.name: CivicLens AR Overlay
features.description: Point camera at street → AR pins appear on live view showing issue severity, report count, officer ETA, risk score.
features.tech: browser MediaDevices API + DeviceOrientation API + Google Maps geocoding + Gemini Vision

features.name: Disaster Mode
features.description: Hidden Simulate Flood button seeds 25 mock waterlogging reports. UI auto-shifts to Disaster Mode dashboard: flood depth estimate, AI evacuation routes, shelter locations, BBMP + NDRF auto-alert.

features.name: Corruption Detection
features.description: Simulate Fake Closure button runs Gemini Vision diff on before/after photos, detects mismatch, spikes officer Integrity Risk Score to HIGH.
features.example_output: Officer 147: Integrity Risk → HIGH. 12 SLA breaches flagged. 7 suspicious closures. 5 fake images.

features.name: AI Explainability Panel
features.description: Every AI decision is human-readable. Priority Score breakdown, full agent_trace log, and routing rationale shown in 'View AI Thinking' modal.

tech_stack.justification: Image+voice in one API call, native JSON mode
Streaming, same model — no extra API, 12 Indic languages
Purpose-built multi-agent orchestration with tool calling
Entire BBMP guidebook in system prompt — no vector DB needed
Google-native, zero cold-starts, auto-scale, production SLA
Native Google, CDN, integrates with Firebase Auth
Managed, Google SLA, spatial indexes for geo queries
Managed, sub-ms lookup, same Redis API
CREATE MODEL in SQL, <5min training, zero setup risk
Real-time streaming inserts for Digital Twin layer
Direct Gemini Vision integration, Google CDN
Superior Indic geocoding, CivicLens AR anchor, Routes API
Escalation + Prediction agents fire reliably, no polling

frontend_stack.usage: Apple/Linear-style premium design system, glassmorphism, responsive grid
Core application logic, agent simulations, interactive components
Smooth, high-performance animations across the site
Scroll-based staggered reveals and parallax effects

database_schema.issues: id UUID PK · created_at/updated_at · category ENUM · subcategory TEXT · severity ENUM · status ENUM(6 stages) · location GEOGRAPHY POINT · ward_id FK · media_urls TEXT[] · reporter_id FK · assigned_officer_id FK · gemini_confidence FLOAT · gemini_raw_response JSONB · agent_trace JSONB · priority_score INT · vote_count INT · duplicate_of UUID FK · resolved_at · resolution_photo_url · reporter_rating 1–5 · integrity_flag BOOL · ar_metadata JSONB
database_schema.users: id UUID PK · phone/email · preferred_language · civic_points INT · community_contribution_score FLOAT · area_improvement_score FLOAT · badge_ids INT[] · is_volunteer BOOL · ward_id FK
database_schema.officers: id UUID PK · name/department FK · ward_ids INT[] · is_available BOOL · current_load INT · sla_score FLOAT · integrity_risk_score FLOAT · fake_closure_count INT · push_token/phone/email
database_schema.digital_twin: id UUID PK · ward_id FK · health_status ENUM(green/amber/red) · last_updated TIMESTAMP · active_issues INT · risk_score FLOAT · bqml_prediction JSONB · layer_data JSONB
database_schema.disaster_events: id UUID PK · event_type · triggered_at · affected_wards INT[] · evacuation_routes JSONB · shelters JSONB · authority_notified_at

backend_apis_needed.name: Gemini API Key
backend_apis_needed.free_tier: Google AI Studio — 15 RPM, 1M TPM, 1500 RPD (gemini-1.5-flash / gemini-2.0-flash)

backend_apis_needed.name: Google Maps Platform API Key
backend_apis_needed.free_tier: $200/month free credit — Maps JavaScript API, Geocoding API

backend_apis_needed.name: Firebase Project Config
backend_apis_needed.free_tier: Spark plan (free) — generous limits for Auth, FCM, Hosting

backend_apis_needed.name: Google Cloud Project ID
backend_apis_needed.free_tier: $300 free trial credit for new accounts; Cloud Run 2M requests/month free

metrics_kpis.target: >500 MACs in pilot ward within 3 months

impact_numbers.flood_prevention_savings: ₹2.1 Cr (early warning vs reactive repair cost delta)
impact_numbers.maintenance_budget_optimised: ₹1.8 Cr (Civic AI Mayor recommendation, Whitefield pilot)
impact_numbers.note: All projections are model estimates from BBMP 2023 data — labelled as projections in UI

sdg_alignment.contribution: Core platform: inclusive, safe, resilient urban management
Corruption Detection AI + full transparency dashboards
NGO integration, CSR dashboard, open municipal API
Drainage + garbage reporting reduces disease vectors
Voice + multilingual AI = digital inclusion for all citizens
Green issue tracking, flood data, illegal dumping monitoring
Waste + sanitation reporting feeds national mission data
Open API integration pathway for 100 Smart City command centres
No biometric data, OTP-only auth, data minimisation by design
Infrastructure tracking + BQML predictive maintenance data layer

submission_checklist.detail: Google Cloud Run, live throughout judging window, min-instances=1
Architecture diagram, agent flow, env setup, demo video GIF
Problem → Solution → Features → Google Tech list → Impact metrics
2-minute screen recording of full demo flow, recorded before submission
Every key screen, including Disaster Mode and Corruption Detection
'View AI Thinking' modal working in live demo
Live CREATE MODEL query shown in demo or README
Airplane mode → report → reconnect → report appears
Backup pre-recorded Gemini Live clip if STT is flaky on stage
Attached as technical documentation in Google Doc

demo_script.judges_see: Gemini Live transcribes. Reporter Agent ✓ → Verification Agent ✓ → Routing Agent ✓
Bengaluru map: green/amber/red zones. Koramangala amber. Risk: 82%, waterlogging likely in ~10 days (BQML)

demo_script.action: Ask Civic AI Mayor: 'Why are potholes increasing in Whitefield?'
demo_script.judges_see: AI: Rainfall +32%, Budget −18%, Traffic +22%. Recommend: ₹1.8 Cr, Zones 4–5. (Cites BBMP Sec 7.3.2)
demo_script.fallback: Pre-canned response shown as typing animation

demo_script.judges_see: 25 waterlogging reports hit API. UI shifts to Disaster Mode. Evacuation routes appear on Google Maps. BBMP alert sent.
demo_script.fallback: Static screenshot of Disaster Mode dashboard

demo_script.judges_see: Corruption Agent runs Gemini Vision diff. Officer 147: Integrity Risk → HIGH. 12 SLA breaches flagged.
Priority Score 91 breakdown + full agent_trace log rendered. Judges see real tool calls.

security.impl: Phone-number only. No passwords. SMS OTP via Firebase Auth.
15-min access tokens. Refresh token rotation on every session.
All citizen photos encrypted at rest in Cloud Storage.
Faces, fingerprints, iris — zero collection. DPDP compliant by design.
Only GPS, category, and media stored. PII stripped from Gemini prompts.
Cloud Armor WAF + Redis: 10 reports/citizen/day hard cap.
Citizens · Officers · Supervisors · Admins — distinct JWT scopes.
Every agent action and officer update logged to BigQuery permanently.
Right to erasure API. Data residency: asia-south1 (Mumbai).
Corruption Detection flags officers — human review required before action.

scalability_phases.scope: 500 wards · 5 cities · API gateway · Drone roadmap
National platform · 1B API calls/year · Export-ready SaaS

safe_claims.say: Under 2 seconds end-to-end on our test hardware
Modelled estimate — methodology in Impact Dashboard
BQML model estimates, confidence shown per-ward

avoid_claims: 94% accuracy (old claim) — too specific for prototype
87% prediction accuracy — replace with 'BQML model outputs per-ward confidence scores'
₹2 Cr savings (bare number) — always label as 'modelled estimate'
3-year historical data — say 'seeded with representative Bengaluru patterns'
